name: wonderly-mcp
description: AI-powered travel planning MCP server — plan smart trips using public holidays to maximize leave days

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --out-dir dist && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/index.js';fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))" && chmod +x dist/index.js
